rationale: Re-grounded at a1194682a9d62cc580aca694e70b0bf5edfca818. The AC5 reconciliation now explicitly classifies panel_decision_test.go:211-219, cmd/mindspec/panel_test.go:557-558, and internal/instruct/panelstate_test.go:903-905 as outcome-preserving input updates, accurately matching the pinned fixtures. The plan now correctly preserves leg 10's threshold-zero reachability, states that config-disabled panels write no audit, and recognizes abandon/env-skip as Warn/Allow paths that proceed to merge. The former already-closed durability concern is also resolved more strongly: panel_refuted is written before close, the failure test proves neither close nor merge runs, and a dedicated pre-closed recovery test verifies the audit is re-derived and written before that branch. The four intended outcome flips and eight enumerated preserving updates now form a coherent, falsifiable AC5 diff-review boundary. No round-1 grounding defect remains.

findings.title: AC5 fixture reconciliation is now exhaustive
findings.detail: Bead 1 step 6(f) explicitly converts panel_decision_test.go:211-219 from 2A+1RC to 3/3 APPROVE while preserving its expected_reviewers=3/no-hardcoded-6 subject. Steps 6(g)-(h) likewise classify the cmd and panelstate at-threshold fixtures as outcome-preserving, and the diff-review proof covers all eight updates.

findings.title: Leg-10 reachability prose corrected
findings.detail: Bead 1 step 4 now says leg 10 remains reachable with zero refutations and grounds the threshold-zero case in panel_test.go:260-277.

findings.title: Already-closed durability path is accurately qualified and tested
findings.detail: Bead 2 places the durable audit before close, no longer relies on the normal path's dolt verification for the recovery branch, and specifies a pre-closed-bead test proving the audit is written before already-closed recovery proceeds.

findings.title: Audit-path rationale corrected
findings.detail: The plan now states only env-skip has panel_gate_skipped metadata, config-disabled has no audit, and abandon/env-skip proceed to merge; durable refutation auditing is grounded solely in AppliedRefutations changing the gate outcome.

findings.title: Cited source states re-verified at the new SHA
findings.detail: The cited gate ordering, threshold-zero fixture, audit guards, merge behavior, and three newly enumerated fixtures were re-verified from commit a1194682a9d62cc580aca694e70b0bf5edfca818.
